page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.e3.xlarge is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 8 physical cores with 1 thread per core, powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor operating at 2.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM, providing a memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or bundled GPUs.

Benchmark results indicate a performance profile that leans toward average multi-core and weak single-core capabilities. The stress-ng single-core CPU performance is categorized as weak, and single-threaded gzip compression is poor. However, multi-core stress-ng performance and PassMark CPU scores fall within the average range. Memory bandwidth tests show average performance, reaching 643.6 GB/sec for cached small blocks and approximately 60.77 GB/sec for uncached large blocks.

The primary tradeoff of the ecs.e3.xlarge is its lower single-threaded processing speed and weaker database operation metrics, as reflected in its weak PassMark database score. However, its high memory density relative to vCPUs makes it a qualitatively cost-efficient option for memory-bound workloads that do not require high-performance local storage. It is suitable for workloads such as static web serving, Redis caching, and general-purpose applications requiring a larger memory footprint without intensive single-core compute demands.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.e3.xlarge is an x86_64 virtual server hosted on the KVM hypervisor, featuring 8 dedicated vCPUs and 64.0 GB of RAM. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz, this instance provides a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core, though it lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Performance benchmarks show a contrast between weak single-core execution, such as in single-threaded gzip compression, and average multi-core performance. Memory bandwidth remains average, with read speeds of 60.77 GB/sec for large blocks. Given these characteristics, the ecs.e3.xlarge offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive tasks that do not demand high single-threaded CPU performance. It is best suited for workloads like static web serving, Redis caching, and general-purpose applications with moderate compute requirements.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.e3.xlarge is an x86_64 KVM instance with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 64 GB RAM. It offers average multi-core performance and is suited for memory-intensive workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.e3.xlarge is an x86_64 KVM server with 8 Intel Xeon vCPUs and 64 GB RAM, optimized for memory-intensive general workloads.
tagline: An x86_64 virtual server featuring high memory density and dedicated Intel Xeon cores for memory-bound general-purpose workloads.

64.0 GB of RAM providing 8.0 GB per core memory density
